name: HYPEFACTORS A/S
summary: HYPEFACTORS A/S provides software-as-a-service (SaaS) solutions for influencer marketing. The company's platform helps brands manage and optimize their influencer marketing campaigns by providing tools for identifying, collaborating with, and tracking the performance of influencers, headquartered in Copenhagen, Denmark. HYPEFACTORS focuses on improving the efficiency and effectiveness of influencer marketing for its clients.
